data.body: MCP-surface sweep landed (commit c212b4b5). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 1 advisory), signed serially at the commit (HEAD stable). mcp_server.py:892 masking swallow FIXED — failure-recording path now logs both the recorder error (exc_info) and the original run error, masking neither. The 2 except BaseException sites (prompt_authoring atomic-write, snapshot child-reap) verified to clean-up-AND-reraise (interrupts propagate) — kept BaseException + justified noqa, NOT narrowed (distinct from d360's harness which swallowed). Step/yaml/lint/reduce/tool-boundary/parity/completion fallbacks justified-noqa (in-band capture or fail-open). No prints in scope. Removed mcp_server + llm/workflow + 4 llm top-level files from the allowlist. Code-review subagent: clean (confirmed BaseException re-raise). Full suite run ALONE (serialized): 3210 passed/12 skipped, HEAD stable — confirms the earlier pollution was concurrent-subagent worktree isolation, not a code defect. make lint green.
